subject: Get inspired: 14 brand new premium DIY lessons
body:
Learnist | Share What You Know iOS App (https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/learnist-worlds-knowledge/id826591175?mt=8&uo=4) · Android App (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.learnist)


**
Hi Jeffrey,
------------------------------------------------------------

Check out these brand new hobby and project ideas to inspire you

http://learni.st/users/lauren.kelly/boards/30526-how-to-speed-read-like-a-pro?utm_source=one_off&utm_medium=member_email&utm_campaign=new_premium_content&utm_content=board_image
How to Speed Read Like a Pro (http://learni.st/users/lauren.kelly/boards/30526-how-to-speed-read-like-a-pro?utm_source=one_off&utm_medium=member_email&utm_campaign=new_premium_content&utm_content=board_title)
BY Lauren Kelly (http://learni.st/users/lauren.kelly/?utm_source=one_off&utm_medium=member_email&utm_campaign=new_premium_content&utm_content=curator_name)

Do you have trouble finishing your reading assignments and comprehending what you read? These tutorials will help you magnify your reading speed as well as maintain or improve your reading comprehension. Let's get started!

buy now $1.99 (http://learni.st/users/lauren.kelly/boards/30526-how-to-speed-read-like-a-pro&utm_medium=member_email?utm_source=one_off&utm_campaign=new_premium_content&utm_content=buy_now_link)

What if you were able to know that you are dreaming, while you are dreaming? If you could have some control over your dream, where would you choose to go? What wonders would you explore? Here are tools to help you enter the world of lucid dreaming.

iOS App · Android App

Hi Jeffrey,

Check out these brand new hobby and project ideas to inspire you

How to Speed Read Like a Pro
BY Lauren Kelly

Do you have trouble finishing your reading assignments and comprehending what you read? These tutorials will help you magnify your reading speed as well as maintain or improve your reading comprehension. Let's get started!

buy now $1.99
Learn to Lucid Dream
BY Brandon Whale

What if you were able to know that you are dreaming, while you are dreaming? If you could have some control over your dream, where would you choose to go? What wonders would you explore? Here are tools to help you enter the world of lucid dreaming.

buy now $1.99
Turn Your Cereal Box into a Magazine Holder
BY Vivian Kerr

Don't throw away your old cereal boxes - repurpose them! Here's how you can use them to make a shelf for your old magazines in just 10 minutes.

buy now $1.99
Learn To Play Backgammon
BY Dave Stancliff

Historians say Backgammon, which is popular worldwide, has its origin in ancient Mesopotamia in the Persian Empire. Backgammon is the perfect blend of luck and skill. Learn about its origins and how to play.

buy now $1.99
The Ayurvedic Approach to Health
BY Jacob Van Putten

Ayurveda is a holistic healing science that has been used for over 5000 years in India that uses dietary, lifestyle and herbal approaches to health. Here you will learn the basic tenets of ayurvedic medicine and how to incorporate them into your life.

buy now $1.99
Learn to Play Ukulele in Five Easy Steps
BY Brian Noe

From its beginnings in Hawaii, the ukulele's popularity has spread around the world. It's seen another resurgence in recent years, with Pop acts such as Jason Mraz and Train incorporating it into signature hits. It's easy to learn, so join in the fun!

buy now $1.99
How to Take the Perfect Selfie
BY David Christopher Marino

Selfies have become all the rage. The word selfie even made it's way into the Dictionary in 2013. Whether your selfie is driven by ego or capturing your life in real time, the phenomenon elicits a strong response. Here's my proven approach.

buy now $1.99
The Beginning Astronomer's Guide to Objects in the Sky
BY Carolyn Petersen

If you're a stargazer, you're probably wondering what all those things in the sky really are! This lesson introduces you to the most commonly seen objects and gives you tips on how to observe them.

buy now $1.99
An Absolute Beginner's Guide to Watching The Sky
BY Carolyn Petersen

Come stargazing with me! This must-have board gets you started! Learn what to observe and what you need to do it. I'm a science writer and astronomer, and teach astronomy through my videos, books, online articles, and museum exhibits.

buy now $1.99
All about Geodesic Dome Greenhouses
BY Chiwara Permaculture Research & Education

Two permaculture design tools meet to make a super-season extender: the geodesic dome greenhouse. Whether you build from scratch or from a kit, these greenhouses are sturdy, energy efficient and made to last.

buy now $1.99
How to Make a Hanging Flower Basket
BY Traci J. Macnamara

Instead of buying an expensive hanging flower basket that isn’t exactly what you want, learn how to create a custom one that you love.

buy now $1.99
A Grownup's Guide to Beautiful Penmanship
BY Learnist

If you've ever wished for lovely handwriting, this lesson is for you. In these times, when beautiful and legible cursive writing seems like a dying art, it's also a mark of distinction and accomplishment. Read on to achieve good penmanship.

buy now $1.99
Beginner’s Guide to Blogging, Part 3: Traffic, Analytics, and Social Media
BY Jessie Voigts

In Beginner’s Guide to Blogging Parts 1 and 2, you learned how to create, write, and maintain your blog. Here in Part 3, I’ll cover traffic, website analytics, and share my hard-earned tips and tricks from a decade of using social media.

buy now $1.99
A Beginner's Guide to Backyard Beekeeping
BY Chiwara Permaculture

Could beekeeping be for you? Learn about the many benefits of keeping bees, what you'll need to get started and how to avoid the stumbling blocks along the way of this interesting and rewarding endeavor.

buy now $1.99
